ihl : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size
ihr : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size
⊢ 1 + max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size

cases le_total t₁.height t₂.height with

      have h₂ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size := ihr
      have h₃ : t₂.size ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by

      have h₂ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size := ihl
      have h₃ : t₁.size ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by

have h₁ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size := ihl
     have h₂ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size := ihr
     have h₃ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
       cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;>
         simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left, add_comm, add_left_comm]
     <;> omega
  }
  {
   induction t with
   | null  => simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
   | node t₁ x t₂ ihl ihr =>
     simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
     have h₁ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
     have h₂ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
     have h₃ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
       cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;>
         simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left, pow_add, pow_one, pow_two, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
       <;>
         (try omega) <;>

             have h₅ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
             nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₁.height,

     <;>
       omega

<;>
    (try (omega)) <;>
    (try
      (
        nlinarith [Nat.le_add_left (t₁.height) (t₂.height),
          Nat.le_add_right (t₁.size) (t₂.size)]
      )) <;>
    (try
      (
        cases' max_cases (t₁.height) (t₂.height) with h h <;>
          simp_all [h, Nat.add_assoc] <;>
          nlinarith
      ))
  }
  {
    -- Prove that the size of the tree is less than 2 raised to the power of its height
    refine' fun t => _
    induction t with
    | null =>
      simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
    | node t₁ _ t₂ ihl ihr =>
      simp_all [Tree.height, Tree.size, pow_add, pow_one, Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Use the fact that for non-empty trees, the size is less than 2^height
          have h₁ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
          have h₂ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
          have h₃ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
            cases' max_cases t₁.height t₂.height with h₄ h₄ <;>
              simp_all [pow_add, pow_one, mul_add, mul_one, Nat.add_assoc]
            <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₁.height,
                  pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₂.height]
              }) <;>
            (try
              {
                nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₁.height,
                  pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₂.height]
              })
          omega
        })
  }

-- We need to prove that 1 + max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size
     -- This is equivalent to max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size
     -- Since max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.height + t₂.height and t₁.height ≤ t₁.size, t₂.height ≤ t₂.size
     have h₁ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size := ihl
     have h₂ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size := ihr
     have h₃ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.height + t₂.height := by
       -- max a b ≤ a + b
       cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;> simp_all [max_eq_left, max_eq_right] <;>
         nlinarith
     have h₄ : t₁.height + t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
       -- t₁.height + t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size
       linarith
     have h₅ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
       -- max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size
       linarith
     linarith
  }
  {
   have h : ∀ (t : Tree α), t.size < 2 ^ t.height := by
     intro t
     induction t with
     | null => simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
     | node t₁ x t₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
       simp [Tree.height, Tree.size, pow_add, pow_one, pow_max]
       -- We need to prove that 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height)
       -- This is equivalent to 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)
       -- Since t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height and t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height, and 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) and similarly for t₂
       have h₁ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ih₁
       have h₂ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ih₂
       have h₃ : t₁.height ≤ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
         apply le_max_left
       have h₄ : t₂.height ≤ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
         apply le_max_right
       have h₅ : (2 : ℕ) ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         apply pow_le_pow_right
         · norm_num
         · exact h₃
       have h₆ : (2 : ℕ) ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         apply pow_le_pow_right
         · norm_num
         · exact h₄
       have h₇ : t₁.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         linarith
       have h₈ : t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         linarith
       have h₉ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         omega
       have h₁₀ : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         ring
       have h₁₁ : 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         ring_nf
         <;> simp [pow_succ]
         <;> ring_nf
       have h₁₂ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
         linarith
       linarith
   exact h t
  }

have h₁ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size := by
          have h₁ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size ∧ t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := by
            apply pair
          exact h₁.1
        have h₂ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size := by
          have h₂ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size ∧ t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := by
            apply pair
          exact h₂.1
        -- Now we need to prove 1 + max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size
        have h₃ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
          -- Use the fact that max a b ≤ a + b
          have h₄ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.height + t₂.height := by
            cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;> simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left] <;>
              nlinarith
          have h₅ : t₁.height + t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
            -- Use the induction hypotheses
            have h₅₁ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size := h₁
            have h₅₂ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size := h₂
            nlinarith
          -- Combine the inequalities
          linarith
        -- Now we can conclude the proof
        nlinarith
      · -- Prove size < 2^height
        simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
        have h₁ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := by
          have h₁ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size ∧ t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := by
            apply pair
          exact h₁.2
        have h₂ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := by
          have h₂ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size ∧ t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := by
            apply pair
          exact h₂.2
        -- Use the fact that 2^(a+1) = 2 * 2^a ≥ 2^a + 2^b if a ≥ b
        have h₃ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
          have h₄ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := h₁
          have h₅ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := h₂
          have h₆ : max t₁.height t₂.height = t₁.height ∨ max t₁.height t₂.height = t₂.height := by
            cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;> simp [max_eq_right, max_eq_left] <;>
              (try omega) <;> (try simp_all)
          cases' h₆ with h₆ h₆
          · -- Case: max t₁.height t₂.height = t₁.height
            have h₇ : max t₁.height t₂.height = t₁.height := h₆
            have h₈ : t₂.height ≤ t₁.height := by
              simp_all [max_eq_left]
              <;> omega
            have h₉ : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ t₁.height := by
              apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
              <;> exact h₈
            have h₁₀ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := h₂
            have h₁₁ : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ t₁.height := h₉
            have h₁₂ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := by linarith
            calc
              1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                gcongr <;> simp_all [h₇]
              _ = 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₁.height := by rfl
              _ = 1 + 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by ring
              _ = 1 + 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) := by
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [pow_succ]
                <;> ring
              _ ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₁.height) := by
                have h₁₃ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₁.height) := by
                  have h₁₄ : 2 ^ (1 + t₁.height) = 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                    ring_nf
                    <;> simp [pow_succ]
                    <;> ring
                  have h₁₅ : 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) = 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                    ring_nf
                    <;> simp [pow_succ]
                    <;> ring
                  rw [h₁₄]
                  have h₁₆ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) = 1 + 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                    rw [h₁₅]
                    <;> ring
                  rw [h₁₆]
                  <;> nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₁.height]
                omega
              _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                simp [h₇]
                <;> ring_nf
          · -- Case: max t₁.height t₂.height = t₂.height
            have h₇ : max t₁.height t₂.height = t₂.height := h₆
            have h₈ : t₁.height ≤ t₂.height := by
              simp_all [max_eq_right]
              <;> omega
            have h₉ : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ t₂.height := by
              apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
              <;> exact h₈
            have h₁₀ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := h₁
            have h₁₁ : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ t₂.height := h₉
            have h₁₂ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := by linarith
            calc
              1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 1 + 2 ^ t₂.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                gcongr <;> simp_all [h₇]
              _ = 1 + 2 ^ t₂.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := by rfl
              _ = 1 + 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by ring
              _ = 1 + 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) := by
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [pow_succ]
                <;> ring
              _ ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₂.height) := by
                have h₁₃ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₂.height) := by
                  have h₁₄ : 2 ^ (1 + t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                    ring_nf
                    <;> simp [pow_succ]
                    <;> ring
                  have h₁₅ : 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) = 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                    ring_nf
                    <;> simp [pow_succ]
                    <;> ring
                  rw [h₁₄]
                  have h₁₆ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) = 1 + 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                    rw [h₁₅]
                    <;> ring
                  rw [h₁₆]
                  <;> nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₂.height]
                omega
              _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                simp [h₇]
                <;> ring_nf
        -- Now we can conclude the proof
        exact h₃
  exact pair

have h₁ : 1 + max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size := by
        have h₂ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
          have h₃ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size := by apply ih₁
          have h₄ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size := by apply ih₂
          -- Consider the two cases for the max
          cases' le_total (t₁.height) (t₂.height) with h₅ h₅
          · -- Case: t₁.height ≤ t₂.height
            simp [max_eq_right, h₅]
            <;> nlinarith

  · -- Prove t.size < 2 ^ t.height
    induction t with
    | null => simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
    | node t₁ x t₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
      simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
      have h₁ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        have h₂ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := by apply ih₁
        have h₃ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := by apply ih₂
        have h₄ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := by
          omega
        have h₅ : 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
          -- Prove that 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height)
          have h₆ : max t₁.height t₂.height = t₁.height ∨ max t₁.height t₂.height = t₂.height := by
            cases' le_total (t₁.height) (t₂.height) with h₆ h₆
            · -- Case: t₁.height ≤ t₂.height
              simp [max_eq_right, h₆]
              <;> omega
            · -- Case: t₂.height ≤ t₁.height
              simp [max_eq_left, h₆]
              <;> omega
          cases' h₆ with h₆ h₆
          · -- Case: max t₁.height t₂.height = t₁.height
            have h₇ : t₂.height ≤ t₁.height := by
              cases' le_total (t₁.height) (t₂.height) with h₇ h₇
              · -- Subcase: t₁.height ≤ t₂.height
                simp_all [max_eq_right]
                <;> omega
              · -- Subcase: t₂.height ≤ t₁.height
                simp_all [max_eq_left]
            have h₈ : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ t₁.height := by
              apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
              exact h₇
            calc
              1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                gcongr <;> simp_all
              _ = 1 + 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by ring
              _ = 1 + 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) := by
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [pow_succ]
                <;> ring
              _ ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₁.height) := by
                have h₉ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₁.height) := by
                  have h₁₀ : 2 ^ (1 + t₁.height) = 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                    ring_nf
                    <;> simp [pow_succ]
                    <;> ring
                  have h₁₁ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) ≤ 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                    have h₁₂ : 2 ^ (t₁.height + 1) = 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by
                      ring_nf
                      <;> simp [pow_succ]
                      <;> ring
                    rw [h₁₂]
                    <;> nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₁.height]
                  linarith
                linarith
              _ = 2 ^ (1 + t₁.height) := by rfl
              _ ≤ 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                rw [h₆]
                <;> simp [add_assoc]
          · -- Case: max t₁.height t₂.height = t₂.height
            have h₇ : t₁.height ≤ t₂.height := by
              cases' le_total (t₁.height) (t₂.height) with h₇ h₇
              · -- Subcase: t₁.height ≤ t₂.height
                simp_all [max_eq_right]
              · -- Subcase: t₂.height ≤ t₁.height
                simp_all [max_eq_left]
                <;> omega
            have h₈ : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ t₂.height := by
              apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
              exact h₇
            calc
              1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 1 + 2 ^ t₂.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                gcongr <;> simp_all
              _ = 1 + 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by ring
              _ = 1 + 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) := by
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [pow_succ]
                <;> ring
              _ ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₂.height) := by
                have h₉ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) ≤ 2 ^ (1 + t₂.height) := by
                  have h₁₀ : 2 ^ (1 + t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                    ring_nf
                    <;> simp [pow_succ]
                    <;> ring
                  have h₁₁ : 1 + 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) ≤ 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                    have h₁₂ : 2 ^ (t₂.height + 1) = 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                      ring_nf
                      <;> simp [pow_succ]
                      <;> ring
                    rw [h₁₂]
                    <;> nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₂.height]
                  linarith
                linarith
              _ = 2 ^ (1 + t₂.height) := by rfl
              _ ≤ 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                rw [h₆]
                <;> simp [add_assoc]
        omega
      exact h₁

have h : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.height + t₂.height := by
        cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h₁ h₁ <;>
          simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left, add_assoc] <;>
          nlinarith
      have h₂ : t₁.height + t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by

  · -- Prove t.size < 2 ^ t.height
    have h : ∀ (t : Tree α), t.size < 2 ^ t.height := by
      intro t
      have h₁ : t.size < 2 ^ t.height := by
        -- Use the fact that the size of the tree is less than 2^height
        have h₂ : ∀ (t : Tree α), t.size < 2 ^ t.height := by
          intro t
          induction t with
          | null => simp [Tree.size, Tree.height]
          | node t₁ x t₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
            simp [Tree.size, Tree.height, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one]
            -- The size of the current node is 1 + size t₁ + size t₂
            -- We need to show 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height + 1)
            -- We know t₁.size < 2^t₁.height and t₂.size < 2^t₂.height from the induction hypothesis
            -- We also know max t₁.height t₂.height ≥ t₁.height and max t₁.height t₂.height ≥ t₂.height
            -- Therefore 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2^t₁.height and similarly for t₂
            -- This gives us 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 1 + 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height)
            -- = 1 + 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height + 1)
            -- But we need < 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height + 1)
            -- So we need to prove 1 + 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height) ≤ 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height + 1)
            -- Which is equivalent to 1 + 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height) ≤ 2^(max t₁.height t₂.height)
            -- This is only true if max t₁.height t₂.height ≥ 1, but in our case t₁ and t₂ could be empty
            -- If t₁ and t₂ are empty, then max t₁.height t₂.height = 0 and 1 + 0 + 0 < 2^1
            -- So we need to consider cases
            have h₃ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ih₁
            have h₄ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ih₂
            have h₅ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≥ t₁.height := by
              apply le_max_left
            have h₆ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≥ t₂.height := by
              apply le_max_right
            have h₇ : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
              apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
              exact h₅
            have h₈ : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
              apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
              exact h₆
            have h₉ : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
              calc
                t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := by
                  linarith
                _ ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
                  have h₁₀ : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := h₇
                  have h₁₁ : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := h₈
                  linarith
            have h₁₀ : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 1 + (2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              linarith
            have h₁₁ : 1 + (2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height) = 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) := by
              have h₁₂ : 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height = 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) := by
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [pow_succ]
                <;> ring_nf
              rw [h₁₂]
              <;> ring_nf
            have h₁₂ : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) := by
              linarith
            have h₁₃ : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) := by
              have h₁₄ : 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) + 1 := by
                omega
              have h₁₅ : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) ≥ 1 := by
                apply Nat.one_le_pow
                <;> omega
              have h₁₆ : 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) ≥ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height + 1) := by
                omega
              omega
            omega
        exact h₂ t
      exact h₁
    exact h t

         cases' le_total (t₁.height) (t₂.height) with h h <;>
         simp_all [max_eq_left, max_eq_right, pow_succ] <;>
         nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₁.height,
           pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₂.height]
       })
  }

have h₁ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
        have h₂ : t₁.height ≤ t₁.size := ihl
        have h₃ : t₂.height ≤ t₂.size := ihr
        have h₄ : max t₁.height t₂.height ≤ max t₁.size t₂.size := by
          apply max_le_max <;> assumption
        have h₅ : max t₁.size t₂.size ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size := by
          cases' le_total t₁.size t₂.size with h₆ h₆ <;> simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left] <;>
            nlinarith
        linarith
      nlinarith
  }
  {
    induction t with
    | null  => simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
    | node t₁ x t₂ ihl ihr =>
      simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
      <;>
      (try cases t₁ <;> cases t₂ <;> simp_all [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul])
      <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₁ : 2 ^ t₁.height > t₁.size := by
            have h₂ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl.2
            linarith
          have h₃ : 2 ^ t₂.height > t₂.size := by
            have h₄ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr.2
            linarith
          have h₅ : 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
            simp [pow_succ]
          have h₆ : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 ^ t₁.height ∨ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 ^ t₂.height := by
            cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h₇ h₇
            · exact Or.inr (by
                have h₈ : max t₁.height t₂.height = t₂.height := by simp [h₇, max_eq_right]
                rw [h₈]
                <;> simp [pow_le_pow_right, Nat.le_of_lt_succ, Nat.lt_succ_self]
                <;> omega)
            · exact Or.inl (by
                have h₈ : max t₁.height t₂.height = t₁.height := by simp [h₇, max_eq_left]
                rw [h₈]
                <;> simp [pow_le_pow_right, Nat.le_of_lt_succ, Nat.lt_succ_self]
                <;> omega)
          cases h₆ with
          | inl h₆ =>
            have h₇ : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 ^ t₁.height := h₆
            have h₈ : 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 * 2 ^ t₁.height := by
              have h₉ : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 ^ t₁.height := h₆
              nlinarith
            have h₉ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              have h₁₀ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl.2
              have h₁₁ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr.2
              have h₁₂ : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
                cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h₁₃ h₁₃ <;> simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left]
                <;> omega
              have h₁₃ : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
                cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h₁₄ h₁₄ <;> simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left]
                <;> omega
              have h₁₄ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                nlinarith
              exact h₁₄
            simp_all [pow_succ]
            <;> nlinarith
          | inr h₆ =>
            have h₇ : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 ^ t₂.height := h₆
            have h₈ : 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 * 2 ^ t₂.height := by
              have h₉ : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 2 ^ t₂.height := h₆
              nlinarith
            have h₉ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              have h₁₀ : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl.2
              have h₁₁ : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr.2
              have h₁₂ : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
                cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h₁₃ h₁₃ <;> simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left]
                <;> omega
              have h₁₃ : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
                cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h₁₄ h₁₄ <;> simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left]
                <;> omega
              have h₁₄ : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
                nlinarith
              exact h₁₄
            simp_all [pow_succ]
            <;> nlinarith
        })
  }

<;>
     (try decide) <;>
     (try omega) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;>
         simp_all [max_eq_left, max_eq_right, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff] <;>
         nlinarith
       })
  }
  {
   induction t with
   | null  => simp [Tree.height, Tree.size]
   | node t₁ x t₂ ihl ihr =>
     simp [Tree.height, Tree.size, pow_succ] at *
     <;>
     (try decide) <;>
     (try omega) <;>
     (try
       {
         cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;>
         simp_all [max_eq_left, max_eq_right, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff] <;>
         nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₁.height,
           pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) t₂.height]
       })
  }

<;>
     (try decide) <;>
     (try {
       cases' le_total t₁.height t₂.height with h h <;>
       simp_all [max_eq_right, max_eq_left, le_add_iff_nonneg_right, le_add_iff_nonneg_left, add_assoc]
       <;>
       omega
     }) <;>
     (try omega)
